name: RPlog_Aramis_Promoted
title: Aramis Promoted
summary: Aboard a New Republic vessel after a costly skirmish with Imperial troops over the Malevolence, the Twi'lek Kegren surprises the weary pilot Aramis Tyrese with happy business. She formally promotes him to the rank of Flight Officer for his piloting skill and teamwork in the combat over Coruscant, though her eyes betray a sad concern for how hard he drives himself. Aramis accepts with easy humor, then reveals he has arranged with Lieutenant Colonel Archilles and General Skywalker to fly a rescue of orphaned children stranded on Coruscant the next day. Kegren, unable to join him and clearly worried, urges him to watch his six before slipping away. She wanders back to her quarters in a daze, feeling as though she is quietly losing her friend.
